meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Finish SaaS Apps Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS development. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to bypass the 'can't finish projects' trap and ship faster.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' trap stems from architectural drift and scope creep. By deploying the Antigravity project template, you enforce a modular, opinionated structure that forces MVP completion. Combined with Claude Code's autonomous execution, you bridge the gap between initial prototype and production-ready revenue generation in record time.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: a graveyard of half-baked repositories, abandoned side projects, and 'great ideas' that never saw a production server. You are caught in the architect's paralysis, where the vision is clear but the execution engine is stalling under the weight of manual scaffolding and decision fatigue.

It is time to abandon the DIY trap. Professional ship-velocity is not about working harder; it is about adopting an immutable infrastructure that forces you to the finish line. The Antigravity project template is your antidote to the 'perpetual prototype' cycle, providing the high-octane framework required to launch, iterate, and monetize before your momentum dies.

steps.title: Define the Revenue-First Scope
steps.description: Strip your project down to the one feature that solves a burning problem. Use Antigravity to generate the core schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project structure. Focus on a lean 'Value-First' architecture with Supabase auth and Stripe integration. Strip all non-essential UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Scaffold project base using Antigravity patterns for auth and payments'

steps.title: Automate the Database Lifecycle
steps.description: Stop manually writing migrations. Use the template's built-in migration automation to keep your schema in sync with your product vision.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate migration scripts for a multi-tenant SaaS schema including users, organizations, and subscription plans.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate and apply Drizzle migrations for the defined multi-tenant schema'

steps.title: Implement the 'Antigravity' Core Loop
steps.description: Establish the main business logic loop that handles your primary value proposition. This is the heart of your monetization.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the core business service layer that processes incoming requests and interfaces with the OpenAI API for value generation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the service layer for core value generation using the Antigravity pattern'

steps.title: Enforce Strict API Contracts
steps.description: Prevent integration bugs by defining strict types between your frontend and backend early in the process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define TypeSafe API contracts using tRPC for all endpoints within the Antigravity template.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure tRPC routers and ensure end-to-end type safety for the user dashboard'

steps.title: Ship to Production Environment
steps.description: Configure the automated deployment pipeline to ensure your code is always reachable, forcing you to maintain a shippable state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel-compatible deployment configuration with CI/CD triggers for main branch pushes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure production deployment pipeline and environment variables'

pro_tips: Never build a feature that doesn't have a corresponding Stripe pricing tier associated with it.
Treat your project template as an immutable product; if you want a new library, add it to the template, not the project.
Use Claude Code to perform 'self-code-reviews' by asking it to find potential points of failure in your business logic.
Limit your development sessions to 90 minutes; use the Antigravity template to force a deploy at the end of every session.
If you find yourself writing boilerplate code for more than 10 minutes, stop and create an Antigravity generator for it.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop with 5 target customers to validate your revenue model before adding new features.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your best ideas rot in a local folder. Use the Antigravity template to strip away the complexity and focus on what matters: shipping a product that people pay for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
